requestType.name: General Help Desk Request
requestType.description: Submit a Request or report and issue; fields below are based upon your selection.

status.description: This was auto-generated by Jira Service Management during workflow import
status.name: Waiting for support

content.text: We have assigned your request HEAL-33633 to an appropriate Help Desk team member. They will reach out to you shortly with an update.
Here is the error that I see for that order:
{"httpStatusCode":400,"errors":["The City field is required.","The PostalCode field is required.","The AddressLine1 field is required.","The StateProvince field is required."]}
This means the address doesn’t have any values and you will need to add it and resubmit the order.
the shipping information is there in the order.
I just reached out to Frankie in the Wellvi Slack channel and asked him to investigate this error on their end. I’ll update you when I have more information.
I’m going to pass this back to our SF team to determine the root cause- the error is generated internally and is blocking submission to Wellvi, they didn’t receive an order for this yet.
Why is this ticket resolved? Have we found the issue?

New, replacement or troubleshooting for physical equipment–– Laptop, keyboard, printer, etc.
Suspicious activity, lost or stolen hardware, unauthorized access, phishing
